questions.question: The Ministry of Statistics & Programme Implementation (MoSPI) releases the Index of Industrial Production (IIP) at which of the following time intervals?
Who headed the 1915 committee to examine the co-operative movement in India?
The Monetary Policy Committee (MPC) 2025 reduced the policy repo rate under the liquidity adjustment facility (LAF) by 25 basis points with immediate effect to ____.
What was the unemployment rate in India as per the Periodic Labour Force Survey during January to December 2024?
The Industrial Finance Corporation of India (IFCI) was established in:
In March 2025, India's Parliament passed the Bills of Lading Bill, 2025. What was the primary objective of this legislation?​
questions.option_3: To modernise the 169 years old shipping law

questions.question: The exchange rate system was reformed to reflect market conditions. What type of exchange rate regime did India adopt post-1991?
The NK Singh Committee, which was formed in 2016, was associated with which of the following?
questions.option_3: Reviewing the trade deficit in India

questions.question: The Digital India initiative, launched in 2015, marked a significant step in India’s post-reform development trajectory. Which of the following is NOT a pillar of the Digital India initiative?
questions.option_1: Digital Infrastructure as a Utility to Every Citizen

questions.question: In April 2025, who was appointed as the new Deputy Governor of the Reserve Bank of India (RBI)?​
What was the real GDP Growth Rate of India in 2023-24, which was the highest in the previous 12 years, except for 2021-22?
According to CRISIL’s Infrastructure Yearbook 2023, what is the total projected infrastructure spending in India over the next seven years?
The BPO industry emerged due to globalisation. What is a key feature of Business Process Outsourcing (BPO)?
questions.option_3: Providing services to foreign companies from India

questions.question: The Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) has reduced the minimum investment for Zero Coupon Zero Principal (ZCZP) in the Social Stock Exchange (SSE) from ₹10,000 to ______.
The 1991 reforms promoted deregulation of industries. Which industry continued to be reserved for public sector post-1991 reforms?
What is the total budget allocation for infrastructure spending in India for 2023-24?
What percentage of the workforce in India was self-employed in 2023-24, reflecting a growing trend towards entrepreneurship, as per the Economic Survey Report, 2024-25?
What was India’s external debt to GDP ratio at the end of September 2024?
In industrial settings, Freon-12 is most commonly manufactured by which chemical reaction?
What was the poverty headcount ratio in urban areas in 2019-21, as per the National Multidimensional Poverty Index 2023?
What was the rate of increase in capital expenditure by the central government on major infrastructure sectors from 2019-20 to 2023-24?
The Gini Coefficient is used to measure which of the following?
What percentage of households were classified as the poorest of the poor, as per SECC-2011?
What was the total financial allocation for the Department of Rural Development for FY 2024-25, as per the Demand of Grants 2024-25 Analysis?

What was the Revised Estimate (RE) for the Department of Rural Development for the financial year 2024-25, as per the Annual Report 2024-25, published by Ministry of Rural Development, Government of India?
